div.h1: Technical Design: Variadic Function Call Protocol
div.p: Constraint: The register %al acts as a guard, specifying the total number of floating-point/vector parameters passed in XMM registers.

ul.li: Caller Requirement: Before any call to a variadic function, %al must be set.
Callee Usage: printf reads %al to determine how many movaps instructions to execute when saving XMM arguments to the Register Save Area (RSA).
Optimization: If %al is 0, the callee can skip saving floating point registers entirely.
